gate: Any dimension scoring 0 on a blocking item fails the deliverable.

dimensions.criterion: Exactly one playbook loaded; topic in enum; cluster never bulk-loaded; deliverable matches the playbook spine and depth.
Every non-obvious claim carries exactly one tag; one family and one spelling per output; strong tags trace to a source.
Zero currency figures; effort and value in FTE-months / % / time with a disclaimer.
Exactly one brand throughout; no off-brand name, color, or claim.
Every [SUPUESTO]/[OPEN] is paired with a concrete verification next step; no hypothesis shipped as confirmed fact.
Public professional context only; personal/home/family data declined, remainder delivered.
The loaded playbook's own Validation Gate passes (e.g. dated Tier-1 trigger, non-empty anti-scope, named decision owner, fresh outreach trigger).
Deliverable ends in a concrete next action with an owner; not an encyclopedia of facts.
Confidence is stated, not styled; no certainty implied beyond the evidence.
